title: Baxter Stickers
excerpt: One of my favorite new products introduced with American Crafts are the Baxter stickers from Ready Set Go . My initial concept was sort of a slightly thicker than washi tape letter sticker thingie, but the finished product actually has…
body:
One of my favorite new products introduced with American Crafts are the Baxter stickers from Ready Set Go. My initial concept was sort of a  slightly thicker than washi tape letter sticker thingie, but the finished product actually has exceeded all expectations. How cool is that? What's even better is that you can get more bang for your buck with some scissor action like so:

Pretty neat stuff. Two Peas got a whole slew of fun new product in - Dear Lizzy's 5th & Frolic || Crate Paper's Acorn Avenue || Studio Calico's Wonderland
